---
title: "Teaching"
# title-block-style: "plain"
# title-block-banner: true
---

<!-- ## 法政大学 -->

## 学部

:::: {.course-grid}

::: {.course-card .is-linked}
[計算機実習A](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/computer-literacy-book/){.course-name .stretched-link}

[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> 1年]{.tag} [<i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i> 春学期]{.tag .term-spring} [<i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 水1]{.tag} [<i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> W305]{.tag}
:::

::: {.course-card .is-linked}
[リレーショナル・データベース](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/database-book/){.course-name .stretched-link}

[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> 3年]{.tag} [<i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i> 春学期]{.tag .term-spring} [<i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 水2]{.tag} [<i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> W305]{.tag}
:::

::: {.course-card .is-linked}
[社会システム](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/data-science-book/){.course-name .stretched-link}

[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> 1年]{.tag} [<i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i> 秋学期]{.tag .term-fall} [<i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 金3]{.tag} [<i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> W305]{.tag}
:::

::: {.course-card .is-linked}
[オペレーションズ・リサーチB](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/or-book/){.course-name .stretched-link}

[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> 2年]{.tag} [<i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i> 秋学期]{.tag .term-fall} [<i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 水2]{.tag} [<i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> W202]{.tag}
:::

::::

## 大学院

:::: {.course-grid}

::: {.course-card}
[最適化アルゴリズム特論]{.course-name}

[<i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i> 秋学期]{.tag .term-fall}
:::

::: {.course-card}
[先進経営科学特論]{.course-name}

[<i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i> 秋学期]{.tag .term-fall}
:::

::::

## 時間割（小金井キャンパス）

:::::: {.period-grid}
::: {.period}
**1限**
9:00–10:40
:::
::: {.period}
**2限**
10:50–12:30
:::
::: {.period}
**3限**
13:20–15:00
:::
::: {.period}
**4限**
15:10–16:50
:::
::: {.period}
**5限**
17:00–18:40
:::
::::::

<!-- ## Lecture Notes

Open-access course notes I maintain — click a title to read online.

::: {.book-links}
[Operations Research](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/or-book/){.book-item}
[Data Science](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/data-science-book/){.book-item}
[Database Systems](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/database-book/){.book-item}
[Computer Literacy](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/computer-literacy-book/){.book-item}
[Reinforcement Learning](https://zi-ang-liu.github.io/rl-book/){.book-item}
::: -->
